title: StageArtifact
description: Output of a completed pipeline stage. Consumed by downstream stages and stored in S3. Contains generated files, structured outputs, gate result, cost, and attempt count.

stage_id.description: Stage identifier matching the BCHADPlan stage ID (e.g. 'migrate', 'api', 'frontend').

generated_files.description: Files created or modified by this stage.

outputs.description: Structured outputs produced by this stage, consumed by downstream stages. Keys are output identifiers (e.g. 'schema_definition', 'endpoint_contracts', 'component_paths', 'migration_summary').

attempts.description: Total number of generation attempts made for this stage, including the final successful one.

cost.description: Total LLM cost for this stage across all attempts, in USD.

GeneratedFile.title: GeneratedFile
GeneratedFile.description: A file that was created or modified by this stage.

path.description: File path relative to the repository root.

action.description: Whether the file was created new or modified in-place.
